name: Estudios teóricos y experimentales de nanosistemas y sus aplicaciones
description: Research on electrochemical systems for energy and environmental applications, combining DFT-based modeling with experimental studies of nanostructures, electrocatalysis, and biomolecular interactions.

name: SuNaLab - Laboratorio de química supramolecular y sistemas nanoestructurados
description: Research on supramolecular and nanostructured systems, including biomembrane interactions, catalysis, and green chemistry approaches.

name: Síntesis Orgánica y Catálisis (SOC-Chem)
description: Research on catalytic organic synthesis, biomass valorization, and the design of bioactive heterocyclic compounds.

name: Físico-química de compuestos anfifílicos y autoensamblados moleculares
description: Research on the physical chemistry of amphiphilic compounds and molecular self-assembled systems.

name: Química teórica-experimental de moléculas de interés ambiental
description: Theoretical and experimental research on molecules of environmental interest and their chemical behavior.

name: Química láser e interacciones no-covalentes
description: Research on laser-driven chemistry and non-covalent interactions in molecular systems.

name: Nano(BIO)Sensores electroquímicos y plasmónicos
description: Development of nano-enabled electrochemical and plasmonic biosensors for analytical and biointerface applications.

name: Síntesis, funcionalización y reactividad de materiales bidimensionales
description: Research on the synthesis, functionalization, and reactivity of two-dimensional materials.

name: Nanomateriales para dispositivos fotovoltaicos y fotoelectroquímicos
description: Research on nanomaterials for photovoltaic and photoelectrochemical devices for energy conversion.

name: Fotoquímica Orgánica, Catálisis Metálica y Biocatálisis
description: Research on organic photochemistry and catalytic processes, including metal catalysis and biocatalysis.

name: Nanobiointerfaces
description: Study of nanostructured materials and their interactions with biological systems at interfaces.

name: Laboratorio Universitario de Química y Contaminación del Aire (LUQCA)
description: Research on air quality, atmospheric pollutants, and environmental chemical processes.

name: Diseño, síntesis y caracterización de nuevos materiales inorgánicos de interés tecnológico
description: Design and characterization of inorganic materials with technological applications.

name: Química orgánica analítica
description: Analytical methods applied to organic compounds and complex chemical systems.

name: Espectroscopía y fotoquímica ambiental
description: Study of environmental processes using spectroscopy and photochemical methods.

name: Nanoplasmónica teórica y experimental
description: Experimental and theoretical research on plasmonic nanostructures and optical properties.

name: Medición y modelado de radiación, aerosoles troposféricos y nubes: Caracterización, implicancias y desafíos
description: Measurement and modeling of radiation, tropospheric aerosols, and cloud systems in the atmosphere.

name: Electroquímica computacional y experimental
description: Combined computational and experimental studies of electrochemical systems.

name: Productos a partir de pirólisis de biomasa y síntesis de heterociclos
description: Research on biomass conversion and the synthesis of heterocyclic compounds for chemical applications.

name: Síntesis de nuevos compuestos orgánicos asistida por Modelado Molecular
description: Design and synthesis of organic compounds supported by molecular modeling techniques.

name: Simulaciones computacionales de nanomateriales
description: Modeling and simulation of nanostructured materials and their properties.

name: Laboratorio de materiales híbridos nanoestructurados y sustentables (LAMHINAS)
description: Development of sustainable hybrid nanomaterials for advanced applications.

name: Laboratorio de electroquímica. Estudios mecanísticos con aplicaciones en electroanalítica e inserción electroquímica
description: Mechanistic studies of electrochemical processes with applications in electroanalysis and electrochemical insertion.

name: Electroquímica de interfaces. ITIES, sensores y bicapas planas.
description: Research on electrochemical interfaces, sensors, and planar bilayer systems.

name: Diseño, síntesis y caracterización de materiales nanoestructurados para aplicaciones nano(bio)tecnológicas
description: Design, synthesis, and characterization of nanostructured materials for nano(bio)technological applications.

name: Nanomateriales híbridos multifuncionales. Diseño y caracterización electroquímica, espectroscópica y mediante microscopías avanzadas
description: Development and characterization of multifunctional hybrid nanomaterials using electrochemical, spectroscopic, and advanced microscopy methods.

name: Productos Naturales Orgánicos Bioactivos (PNOB)
description: Study and synthesis of bioactive natural organic compounds.

name: Group of Trace Elements and Sample Preparation (GATPREM)
description: Development of analytical methods focused on trace elements, sample preparation, and atomic-spectrometric applications in environmental and food matrices.

name: Toxicological Analytical Chemistry
description: Analytical chemistry research for toxicological assessment, including biomonitoring and the measurement of chemical exposure in human populations.

name: BIOESP
description: Research on biosensors and spectroscopic or electrochemical analytical strategies for biologically relevant systems.

name: BIOESP
description: Research on biosensors and spectroscopic or electrochemical analytical strategies for biologically relevant systems.

name: Environmental Analytical Chemistry
description: Analytical chemistry applied to environmental samples, with emphasis on monitoring and assessing pollutants in natural systems.

name: Crystal Structure Determination and Structural-Parameter Analysis
description: Determination of crystal structures and analysis of structural parameters in inorganic and coordination compounds.

name: New Coordination Compounds with Antitumor Activity
description: Synthesis and study of coordination compounds with potential antitumor activity and biomedical relevance.

name: Polynuclear Assemblies Containing Lanthanide Ions
description: Preparation and study of polynuclear assemblies containing lanthanide ions with structural and functional interest.

name: Molecular Containers
description: Design and characterization of molecular containers and related supramolecular systems.

name: Molecular Magnetism
description: Research on coordination compounds and molecular systems with magnetic properties.

name: Molecular Magnetism
description: Research on coordination compounds and molecular systems with magnetic properties.

name: Computational Inorganic Chemistry
description: Computational studies of inorganic systems using molecular modeling and theoretical chemistry tools.

name: Medicinal Inorganic Chemistry
description: Development of inorganic compounds with potential pharmacological activity and biomedical applications.

name: Medicinal Inorganic Chemistry
description: Development of inorganic compounds with potential pharmacological activity and biomedical applications.

name: Toxicological Biomarkers and Exposure-Risk Assessment
description: Use of toxicological biomarkers to characterize exposure and assess health risks in exposed populations.

name: Human Exposure Risk to Naturally Contaminated Groundwater Arsenic
description: Assessment of human exposure and health risk associated with arsenic in naturally contaminated groundwater.

name: ECOSALUD
description: Community-oriented environmental health research linking chemical exposure, territory, and public-health outcomes.

name: Nanoparticles and Films for Radiation Detectors
description: Development of nanoparticles and thin films for radiation-detection devices and related materials applications.

name: Detection Agents for Infectious Processes by Gamma Scintigraphy
description: Design and evaluation of radiolabeled agents for detecting infectious processes by gamma scintigraphy.

name: Molecular Imaging Radiopharmaceuticals for Alzheimer's Disease
description: Development and evaluation of candidate radiopharmaceuticals for molecular imaging in Alzheimer's disease.

name: Molecular Imaging Radiopharmaceuticals for Alzheimer's Disease
description: Development and evaluation of candidate radiopharmaceuticals for molecular imaging in Alzheimer's disease.

name: Chemical Ecology Laboratory (LEQ)
description: Research on chemical communication and natural products in ecological interactions involving insects and plants.

name: Cytotoxic Polyoxygenated Metabolites
description: Isolation, synthesis, and study of polyoxygenated metabolites with cytotoxic and bioactive properties.

name: Cytotoxic Polyoxygenated Metabolites
description: Isolation, synthesis, and study of polyoxygenated metabolites with cytotoxic and bioactive properties.

name: Bioactive Compounds in the Central Nervous System
description: Research on the design and study of bioactive compounds relevant to central-nervous-system targets.

name: Pheromone Chemistry
description: Organic-chemistry and natural-products work focused on pheromones and semiochemicals.

name: Oligoamides as Antitrypanosomatid Agents
description: Design and synthesis of oligoamides as candidate agents against trypanosomatid parasites.

name: Oligoamides as Antitrypanosomatid Agents
description: Design and synthesis of oligoamides as candidate agents against trypanosomatid parasites.

name: Structural Diversity Discovery
description: Synthetic chemistry strategies aimed at expanding structural diversity for bioactive-compound discovery.

name: Structural Diversity Discovery
description: Synthetic chemistry strategies aimed at expanding structural diversity for bioactive-compound discovery.

name: Concentration-Effect Relationships and Therapeutic Drug Monitoring
description: Clinical-pharmacology research centered on concentration-effect relationships and therapeutic drug monitoring.

name: PBBM for Bioequivalent Medicines
description: Modeling and simulation work for the development and evaluation of bioequivalent medicines using physiologically based biopharmaceutics modeling.

name: Clinical Pharmacy, Active Pharmacovigilance and Medication Monitoring
description: Clinical-pharmacy research on active pharmacovigilance, pharmacotherapeutic follow-up, and medication monitoring.

name: Pharmaceutical Technology and Quality Control of Medicines
description: Research in pharmaceutical technology and quality control aimed at formulation development and medicine quality assurance.

name: Carbonization and Hydrothermal Liquefaction of Biomass
description: Thermochemical conversion of biomass through carbonization and hydrothermal liquefaction for energy-related applications.

name: Adsorbents and Catalysts Based on Modified Minerals and Clays
description: Preparation and study of adsorbents and catalysts based on modified minerals and clays.

name: Materials for Energy Conversion and Storage
description: Preparation and characterization of materials for energy conversion and storage, especially hydrogen-related systems.

name: Hydrogen Production from Renewable Resources
description: Research on hydrogen production from renewable resources and related energy-conversion strategies.

name: Food Science and Analytical Chemistry Group
description: Hilda Inés Ucedo Samudio is publicly listed across Bioquímica, Química y Farmacia and Química Industrial with teaching in qualitative analytical chemistry and food analysis.
university: Universidad Católica "Nuestra Señora de la Asunción"

name: Instrumentation and Automation Group
description: Instrumentation and automation projects on fluid-particle transport and environmental/traffic monitoring.
university: Universidad Católica "Nuestra Señora de la Asunción"

name: Lanthanide Coordination Compounds Group
description: Studies luminescence, magnetism, and energy-transfer processes in lanthanide(III) coordination compounds, including single-molecule magnets and solid-state lighting materials.

name: Organochalcogen Synthesis Group
description: Develops sulfur-, selenium-, and tellurium-containing compounds, with emphasis on fluorescent organochalcogen molecules, biological activity, and translational applications.

name: Laboratório de Bioinorgânica, Catálise e Farmacologia
description: Combines bioinorganic chemistry, catalysis, and pharmacology to design metal-based drugs and oxidation catalysts for biomedical and environmental applications.

name: Microbial Natural Products and Coral Metabolomics Group
description: Investigates microbial natural products, coral metabolomics, ecological interactions, and host–microorganism relationships to discover bioactive metabolites.

name: Laboratório de QSAR e Modelagem Molecular de Compostos Bioativos
description: Applies QSAR, 3D-QSAR, and molecular modeling to antibacterial, antiparasitic, antiviral, anti-HIV, and other bioactive compounds.

name: Computational Photophysics Group
description: Uses theoretical and computational chemistry to study photophysics of nucleobases and related compounds, including DNA/RNA photostability and photoinduced reactions.

name: Grupo de Química Computacional Aplicada
description: Uses DFT and related computational tools to investigate reaction mechanisms, ligand effects, and transition-metal catalysis in sustainable synthetic chemistry.

name: Laboratório de Química Bioinorgânica Ambiental e Metalofármacos
description: Works at the interface of inorganic and biological chemistry on environmental bioinorganic systems, metal uptake in aquatic organisms, antimicrobial metal complexes, and chelation therapy.

name: Asymmetric Catalysis for Bioactive Compounds Group
description: Develops chiral organocatalysts and stereoselective cascade reactions for the synthesis of bioactive compound libraries.

name: Grupo PEQuim - Pesquisa em Ensino de Química
description: Researches chemistry education, especially teacher knowledge, pedagogical content knowledge, and chemistry teaching and learning processes.

name: Atomic Spectrometry and Sample Preparation Group
description: Develops elemental analysis methods and reference materials for food, pharmaceutical, environmental, biological, and technological samples using atomic spectrometry techniques.

name: Laboratório de Bioluminescência de Fungos
description: Studies the chemistry and biology of fungal bioluminescence within broader interests in redox biology, bioinformatics, and organic chemistry.

name: Analytical Instrumentation Development Group
description: Designs analytical instrumentation and computational methods for capillary electrophoresis, microfluidics, and contactless electrochemical detection in food, fuel, and environmental applications.

name: Laboratório de Síntese e Reatividade de Compostos Orgânicos de Enxofre
description: Focuses on the synthesis and reactivity of organosulfur compounds, including sulfoxides and asymmetric transformations.

name: Organic Photochemistry and Chemistry Education Group
description: Works on organic photochemistry and photophysics, bioactive compounds, and chemistry education, including haloaromatic systems and biocatalysts from Brazilian flora.

name: Laboratório Laqise-Bimet
description: Develops metal-containing compounds and delivery systems in synthetic and structural bioinorganic chemistry for anticancer, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial applications.

name: Macromoléculas em interfaces e superfícies
description: Studies polymers and macromolecules at interfaces, including colloidal stability, polymer–protein interactions, surface properties, and magnetic hybrid materials.

name: Pseudo-Natural Products Group
description: Creates pseudo-natural products and investigates photoscience, synthesis, redox processes, and natural-product-inspired chemistry.

name: Electronic Chemiexcitation in Biological Systems Group
description: Investigates bioluminescence and dark photochemistry in biological systems, focusing on triplet carbonyls, singlet oxygen, and oxidative damage pathways.

name: Microbial Metabolism and Environmental Biosignatures Group
description: Studies how microorganisms respond metabolically to environmental variation and how microbe–mineral and microbe–metal interactions generate chemical biosignatures.

name: Laboratório de Química Computacional
description: Performs theoretical and computational studies on molecular structure, energetics, spectroscopy, kinetics, and chemical dynamics.

name: Chemistry Education Group
description: Researches conceptual learning and chemistry teaching in basic and higher education.

name: Laboratório de Química de Materiais e Energia
description: Develops ceramic materials via non-conventional synthesis routes for fuel cells, photovoltaics, luminescent devices, photocatalysis, and related energy applications.

name: Molecular Photo Dynamics
description: Works on organic photochemistry and photophysics, natural dyes, and colloid/surface chemistry, including organized systems and environmental photodegradation.

name: FuNII Lab (Functional Nanoscale Imaging of Interfaces)
description: Develops spatially resolved electrochemical instrumentation to investigate nanoscale interfacial processes in biotic and abiotic systems.

name: Synthesis and Photochemistry of Porphyrinic and Dendrimeric Compounds Group
description: Designs porphyrin- and dendrimer-based systems for photoswitches, photosynthesis models, photodynamic therapy, and host–guest nanostructures.

name: Chemistry Education and Outreach Group
description: Researches chemistry teaching, science communication, and the public image of chemistry, including digital tools for education and outreach.

name: Laboratório de Eletrossíntese Orgânica
description: Explores redox catalysis and electrochemistry in organic synthesis, especially functionalized organosulfur compounds.

name: Ab Initio / DFT and RRKM Computational Studies Group
description: Uses computational chemistry to study laser-induced reactions, unimolecular processes, combustion chemistry, and conformations of bioactive molecules.

name: Nanotechnology Group
description: Builds supramolecular and self-assembled nanostructures based on porphyrins, clusters, and metal complexes for sensors, devices, and functional nanomaterials.

name: Laboratório dos Elementos do Bloco-f
description: Develops rare-earth luminescent and electroluminescent systems for molecular light-converting devices, OLEDs, and optical markers.

name: Instrumental Analytical Chemistry Group
description: Develops electroanalytical instrumentation, spectroelectrochemical methods, flow systems, microfluidics, lab-on-a-chip devices, and chemical sensors.

name: Environmental Analytical Chemistry Group
description: Combines environmental analysis, adsorption processes, advanced oxidation, and thermal methods to address pollutants and pharmaceutical materials.

name: Thermal Analysis and Nanostructured Materials Group
description: Works on synthesis, characterization, thermal analysis, and adsorption properties of diverse materials, including highly ordered mesoporous solids.

name: Metalodrugs and Structural Crystallography Group
description: Develops new metallodrugs for cancer and tuberculosis and applies crystallography to coordination compounds, organometallics, MOFs, and other small molecules.

name: Laboratório de Físicoquímica Orgânica
description: Studies organic reaction mechanisms in micellar and mixed-solvent systems, partition and solubilization processes, and molecular descriptors using LSER, QSRR, and molecular dynamics.

name: Laboratório de Eletroquímica Orgânica (LEO)
description: Researches conductive polymers and electrochemical materials for gas sensors, electronic noses, and applications in environmental and food chemistry.

name: Porous Materials in Analytical and Environmental Chemistry Group
description: Develops porous monolithic materials for chromatography, sample preparation, pollutant monitoring, and interactions of contaminants with mineral and organic surfaces.

name: Gas-Phase Ion Reactivity and Spectroscopy Group
description: Investigates gas-phase ion–molecule reactivity, mechanisms, energetics, ion solvation, and vibrational spectroscopy using combined experimental and theoretical methods.

name: PhotoSyn
description: Develops visible-light photocatalytic and photoredox strategies for the functionalization of organic molecules and selective radical reactions.

name: Laboratório de Quimiluminescência Orgânica
description: Investigates organic chemiluminescence mechanisms and applies them to analytical and bioanalytical methods, including antioxidant assays.

name: Materials, Spectroscopy, and Electrochemistry Group
description: Works across inorganic chemistry, catalysis, materials science, spectroscopy, electrochemistry, photoscience, and synthesis.

name: Laboratory of Supramolecular Chemistry and Nanotechnology
description: Develops supramolecular coordination systems and nanoparticles for nanotechnology and advanced functional-material applications.

name: Laboratório de Química Fine e Biocatálise
description: Develops catalytic and flow-based synthetic methods with a sustainability focus in organic chemistry.

name: Laboratório de Nanomateriais e Catálise
description: Designs metallic nanoparticles and related nanomaterials for heterogeneous catalysis and carbon capture/conversion applications.

name: Laboratório de Catálise de Transferência de Fase
description: Develops chiral phase-transfer catalysts and greener enantioselective synthesis routes to valuable intermediates.

name: Laboratório de Materiais Fotônicos
description: Develops photonic materials for energy conversion and storage, persistent luminescence, bioimaging, catalysis, and transparent films and glasses.

name: Computational Simulation and NMR Parameters Group
description: Uses molecular dynamics, ab initio calculations, and enhanced sampling to study solvent effects and NMR observables in molecular systems.

name: Teacher Education Group
description: Focuses on chemistry teacher education and formation.

name: Instrumental Analytical Chemistry and Chemical Sensors Group
description: Develops rapid analytical methodologies, chemical sensors, electroanalytical methods, flow-analysis systems, modified electrodes, microelectrode arrays, biosensors, and amperometric detection strategies.

name: Laboratório de Biomateriais Poliméricos
description: Develops biodegradable and bioabsorbable polymer biomaterials, including electrospun scaffolds for tissue engineering.

name: Laboratório de Espectroscopia Molecular
description: Uses Raman and SERS spectroscopy to characterize conductive polymers, nanocomposites, natural polymers, and bioanalytical systems.

name: GEPEQ IQUSP - Grupo de Pesquisa em Educação Química
description: Works to improve chemistry teaching through curriculum materials, teacher development, outreach, and research in chemistry education.

name: Laboratório de Cromatografia e Eletroforese Capilar
description: Develops separation and metabolomics methods for clinical, forensic, cosmetic, environmental, food, and pharmaceutical applications.

name: Laboratório de Química de Produtos Naturais
description: Studies natural-product diversity, metabolomics, and biosynthetic/evolutionary questions in plants, especially Piperaceae species.

name: Laboratório de Sensores Eletroquímicos e Microscopia Eletroquímica
description: Develops electrochemical sensors, microelectrodes, and scanning electrochemical microscopy methods for analytical and bioanalytical applications.

name: Molecular Dynamics and Raman Spectroscopy of Liquids Group
description: Combines Raman spectroscopy and molecular dynamics simulations to study ionic liquids, molten salts, glass precursors, and liquid-state structure and dynamics.

name: Polymer and Surfactant Group
description: Works on green chemistry with ionic liquids and deep eutectic solvents, their applications to biopolymers and decontamination, and chemistry education for sustainability.
headOfLab: Omar Abdel Moneim Abou El Seoud

name: Environmental Spectroscopy Group
description: Applies vibrational spectroscopy and electrochemical methods to detect, characterize, and degrade environmentally relevant pollutants.

name: History of Science and Chemistry Education Group
description: Studies how history and philosophy of science can support chemistry teaching, curriculum, and teacher education.

name: Mechanochemistry and Mechanical Reactivity of Solids Group
description: Develops mechanochemical routes for synthesis, nanoparticle production, solid reactivity, and sustainable materials processing.

name: Bioactive Natural Products Group
description: Searches for therapeutically relevant natural products and studies secondary-metabolite biosynthesis, essential oils, and cosmetic applications of natural compounds.

name: Conformational Analysis and Electronic Interactions Group
description: Studies stereoelectronic effects, conformational equilibria, and mechanisms in heterosubstituted carbonyl, phosphoryl, and related compounds using spectroscopy and theory.

name: Raman Spectroscopy of Molecular Interactions Group
description: Uses Raman spectroscopy to investigate molecular interactions in solids and solutions, especially ionic-liquid systems and their physicochemical properties.

name: Carbon Capture and Conversion Group
description: Develops catalytic and sustainable processes to capture CO2 and transform it into fuels, methanol, aviation fuels, and other value-added products.

name: Trace Analysis and Elemental Speciation Group
description: Develops spectrometric methods for trace and ultratrace analysis and elemental speciation in biological, food, and technological samples.

name: Laboratório de Estudos em Química Atmosférica e outros ambientes
description: Studies atmospheric particles, rainwater, soils, pollution sources, and health impacts using chromatographic methods and atmospheric-chemistry models.

name: Potential Energy Surfaces and Physical Chemistry Teaching Group
description: Studies trajectories on potential energy surfaces for atmospheric, combustion, and laser chemistry while also developing computational tools for teaching physical chemistry.

name: Grupo de Química Verde e Ambiental
description: Works in green chemistry with supercritical CO2, ionic liquids, surfactants, amphiphilic polymers, organocatalysis, and carbon capture and conversion.

name: Environmental Chemistry Group
description: Develops catalytic and advanced oxidation processes to degrade persistent pollutants and improve water treatment technologies.

name: Laboratório de Materiais Eletroativos
description: Develops electroactive materials, especially intrinsically conducting polymers and nanostructured systems, for sensors, devices, and controlled drug release.

name: Bioelectrochemistry and Interfaces Group
description: Studies redox biomolecules and solid–liquid interfaces with spectroscopy, electrochemistry, and nanocarbon materials for bioelectronics and bioelectrosynthesis.

name: Vibrational Spectroscopy and Gas Absorption Group
description: Uses Raman, SERS, IR, UV-Vis, NMR, and theory to study intermolecular interactions, ionic liquids, deep eutectic solvents, and pollutant-gas absorption.

name: Electroanalytical Chemistry Group
description: Applies electroanalytical techniques, chemically modified electrodes, boron-doped diamond electrodes, sensors, and biosensors to biological and environmental species.

name: LACIE - Laboratório de Caracterização de Interfases Eletroquímicas
description: Characterizes electrochemical interfaces for corrosion control, metallic materials, and electrochemistry education.

name: Laboratório de Materiais Eletroativos
description: Studies intrinsically conducting polymers and nanostructured hybrid systems for sensors, biosensors, electrochromic devices, and controlled drug release.

name: Reactive Intermediates Mass Spectrometry Group
description: Uses advanced mass spectrometry, ion spectroscopy, and ion mobility to characterize isomeric reaction intermediates in polymers, oxidation chemistry, and drug metabolism.

name: Paixão Group - Electronic Tongue and Chemical Sensors Lab
description: Develops chemical and electrochemical sensors, paper-based analytical devices, and electronic tongues for clinical, environmental, and forensic applications.
headOfLab: Thiago Regis Longo César da Paixão

name: Laboratório de Sólidos Lamelares (LaSol)
description: Researches layered solids and related inorganic materials for fundamental and applied materials chemistry.

name: Research Group of Vitor Leite Martins
description: USP faculty profile listed in the Department of Fundamental Chemistry roster; dedicated research-group details were not exposed on the public profile page during this compilation pass.

name: Laboratório de Caracterização de Polímeros
description: Characterizes polymeric materials and composites using infrared and Raman spectroscopy together with thermal-analysis techniques such as TG, DSC, and DMA.
